title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
